scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:markdown-it && pnpm run build:unified
scripts.check: pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/core" run check && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/markdown-it" run check && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/unified" run check && pnpm --filter markdown-embed-github-examples run check
scripts.format: pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/core" run format && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/markdown-it" run format && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/unified" run format && pnpm --filter markdown-embed-github-examples run format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/core" run format:check && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/markdown-it" run format:check && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/unified" run format:check && pnpm --filter markdown-embed-github-examples run format:check
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/core" run lint && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/markdown-it" run lint && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/unified" run lint && pnpm --filter markdown-embed-github-examples run lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/core" run test && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/markdown-it" run test && pnpm --filter "@markdown-embed-github/unified" run test
